description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult female pedestrian with a slightly hunched posture and arms held loosely at her sides. Her face and arms display dark, mottled markings, suggesting either dirt, injury, or a stylized effect. She is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted top and matching pants, both of which appear worn and stained, giving her a rugged or distressed appearance. The figure has straight, shoulder-length hair that covers part of her face and extends down her back. Her shoes are simple and flat, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The overall look is that of a person who has experienced hardship or is in a scenario requiring resilience.
description: A distressed adult female pedestrian with mottled markings, wearing a fitted short-sleeve top and pants, and straight shoulder-length hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, mottled markings on the face and arms, and the full outfit with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight hair falling behind the back, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair length, and the back of the worn clothing with visible stains.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, arm position, and the side seam of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved fitted top and matching pants with a worn, utilitarian style
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
